insert_sorted_le_dec.solution:
Proof.
  intros a l H.
  induction H.
  - constructor.
  - unfold insert.
    destruct (le_dec a x) as [Hle | Hgt].
    + constructor; auto. constructor.
    + constructor; auto. lia. constructor.
  - simpl. destruct (le_dec a x) as [Hle | Hgt].
    + constructor; auto. constructor; auto.
    + simpl in IHsorted.
      destruct (le_dec a y) as [Hle2 | Hgt2].
      * constructor; auto. lia.
      * constructor; auto. lia.
Qed.
insert_sorted_le_dec.explanation: Same structure as the insert_sorted proof from Sort.v, but using destruct (le_dec ...) instead of bdestruct (_ <=? _).

list_nat_in.solution:
Definition list_nat_in: forall (i: nat) (al: list nat), {In i al}+{~ In i al}
  := in_dec eq_nat_dec.

Example in_4_pi: (if list_nat_in 4 [3;1;4;1;5;9;2;6] then true else false) = true.
Proof. reflexivity. Qed.
list_nat_in.explanation: Use in_dec from the standard library with eq_nat_dec as the equality decision procedure for nat.
